nasb.text: And seizing him by the right hand, he raised him up; and immediately his feet and his ankles were strengthened.

esv.text: And he took him by the right hand and raised him up, and immediately his feet and ankles were made strong.

cnv.text: 於是拉著他的右手，扶他起來；他的腳和踝骨立刻強壯有力，

ccb.text: 彼得拉着他的右手扶他起来，那人的脚和踝骨立刻变得强健有力。

csbs.text: 彼得抓着他的右手，扶他起来。他的脚和踝骨立刻就健壮了。
